title: triphora debilis
intro: Triphora debilis, also known as the lesser butterfly pea, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Leguminosae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Triphora debilis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Triphora debilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or capsule, and it has been used in various herbal preparations to support overall well-being.
